description: Safe SQL gateway for AI agents: SELECT-only validation, access policies, masking, audit trail, evals
name: io.github.nickklos10/querypilot

environmentVariables.description: SQLAlchemy-style database connection URL, e.g. sqlite:///demo.db or postgresql://user:pass@host:5432/db. Equivalent to --database-url.
environmentVariables.name: QUERYPILOT_DATABASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: SQL dialect for the connector. Equivalent to --dialect.
environmentVariables.name: QUERYPILOT_DIALECT

environmentVariables.description: Maximum rows returned per query. Equivalent to --max-rows.
environmentVariables.name: QUERYPILOT_MAX_ROWS

environmentVariables.description: Query execution timeout in seconds. Equivalent to --timeout-seconds.
environmentVariables.name: QUERYPILOT_TIMEOUT_SECONDS

environmentVariables.description: JSON-encoded AccessPolicy (blocked_columns, allowed_columns, row_filters, masking_rules) enforced before execution. Equivalent to --access-policy-json.
environmentVariables.name: QUERYPILOT_ACCESS_POLICY_JSON

environmentVariables.description: MCP transport used by `querypilot mcp`. Equivalent to --transport. Most MCP clients should leave this at stdio; streamable-http is for clients that speak Streamable HTTP directly.
environmentVariables.name: QUERYPILOT_MCP_TRANSPORT

packageArguments.description: Selects the `querypilot mcp` subcommand (as opposed to `serve` or `eval`).

title: QueryPilot
